scripts.dev:host: PICO_HOST_DB=data/pico-host.db PICO_WORKSPACES_DIR=. PICO_HOST_INSECURE_NO_AUTH=1 PICO_HOST_OTEL=1 pnpm --filter @pico/host dev
scripts.dev:host:mock: PICO_HOST_DB=data/pico-host.db PICO_WORKSPACES_DIR=. PI_USE_MOCK=1 PICO_HOST_INSECURE_NO_AUTH=1 PICO_HOST_OTEL=1 pnpm --filter @pico/host dev
scripts.pair: pnpm run build:cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js pair
scripts.pair-code: pnpm run build:cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js pair-code
scripts.serve: pnpm run build:cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js serve
scripts.status: pnpm run build:cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js status
scripts.install:host: pnpm run build:cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js install
scripts.uninstall:host: pnpm run build:cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js uninstall
scripts.start:host: pnpm run build:cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js start
scripts.stop:host: pnpm run build:cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js stop
scripts.logs:host: pnpm run build:cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js logs
scripts.doctor: pnpm run build:cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js doctor
